name: Date Bran Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 egg beater or egg replacer, equivalent to 1 egg
recipeInstructions:
1. Add baking soda and boiling water to a bowl; stir until combined.
Allow the mixture to cool.
2. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine all ingredients and mix well until just incorporated.
4. Let the batter stand for about 5 minutes so the dry ingredients can absorb some of the liquid.
5. Grease a muffin tin with cooking spray.
6. Spoon the batter into the prepared muffin tins.
7. Bake for 25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Allow the muffins to cool before storing them in an airtight container.
They freeze well after baking and cooling.
